sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-03-25 06:13
- Distance: 7.1 km
- Moving time: 40:34
- Elapsed time: 40:38
- Elevation gain: 48 m
- Average heart rate: 155.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 170 bpm
- Average watts: 197.9 W
- Average speed: 10.4 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `156.4 bpm`, ranging from `146.5` to `163.5 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `163.5 spm`, with a working range of `138.2` to `165.3 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `163.4 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `162.1 spm` (-1.3 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:45 /km` across `7.055 km` in `40:34` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:43 /km` and second-half pace was `5:47 /km` (+4 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `155.6 bpm` average and `170 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `149.8 bpm` in the first half and `161.4 bpm` in the second (+11.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `40:34` out of `40:38` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `68.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `4.4 m` and `20.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `29.0 m` in the first half and `39.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
